id.description:
The identifier of the option exercise.

Note: It is possible for this ID to not exist for legacy reasons, in which case the value of this field will be `"NO_ID"`

issuerId.description: The identifier of the issuer that issued the option grant.

stakeholderId.description: The identifier of the stakeholder that holds the option grant being exercised.
stakeholderId.title: The identifier of the stakeholder that holds the option grant being exercised

optionGrantId.description: The identifier of the option grant being exercised.

certificateId.description: The identifier of the certificate issued as a result of the option exercise event completing.

quantity.description: The number of shares being exercised from the related option grant.

exerciseTime.description: The date and time in which the option exercise request was initiated.

state.description: The current state of the exercise request.

exerciseType.description: The type of option exercise being requested.

recordType.description: The type of the record associated with the option exercise.

taxWithholding.description: The tax withholding information associated with the option exercise.

moneyMovement.description: The money movement information associated with the option exercise.

schema_def.description: An option exercise is an event representing a stakeholder exercising their right to purchase shares of an issuer at a set price, the strike price, defined in the option grant being exercised. The result of a successfully completed exercise is the issuance of a certificate.
